projectDescription: A real-time geospatial incident monitoring platform that aggregates events from multiple open sources (GDELT, ACLED, FIRMS, USGS), normalizes them to a canonical model, applies spatio-temporal clustering, and exposes them via a REST API with a React/Mapbox dashboard.
keyFeatures: Multi-source event ingestion (GDELT, ACLED, FIRMS NASA, USGS, OpenSky, AISStream)
Canonical data normalization with UTC timestamps and WGS84 coordinates
DBSCAN spatio-temporal clustering to group events into incidents
Full incident lifecycle state machine (open → updated → stale → closed / false_positive)
Areas of Interest (AOI) with PostGIS spatial filtering
Human-in-the-loop corrections API with append-only audit trail
Military flight relay (OpenSky) and AIS vessel tracking relay
React + Mapbox GL dashboard with 2D/3D map layers and real-time polling
Event validation with quarantine for rejected payloads
Docker Compose deployment for both development and production
publicApiSurface: GET /v1/incidents — list incidents with bbox, category, status, severity, confidence, sources, aoi_id filters
POST /v1/corrections — apply operator correction (false_positive, close, reclassify, relocate, merge)
GET /v1/military-flights — list military flights within active AOI bboxes
GET /v1/ais-vessels — list AIS vessels within active AOI bboxes
POST /v1/admin/run/{source} — trigger ingestion job (usgs, firms, gdelt, acled, clustering)
POST /v1/admin/run/all — trigger all ingestion + clustering + lifecycle jobs
GET /v1/seed — insert test data (3 sample incidents)
